content:
MODULE: cosmos.mcp.tool_router
FILE: cosmos/mcp/tool_router.py (302 lines)
CATEGORY: mcp

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Tool Router
======================

Routes tool calls to the appropriate provider.
Integrates MCP tools with built-in capabilities.

CLASSES:
- ToolRouter: Routes tool calls to appropriate handlers.

Priority:
1. Built-in tools (web sea
  Methods: async def route(self, tool_name: str, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: def list_available_tools(self) -> List[Dict[str, str]]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_tool_router() -> ToolRouter
- async def route_tool_call(tool_name: str, params: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]
